title: Jim Cramer sees an additional 25% upside for our newest stock due to this catalyst
description: FedEx stock can go even higher after the delivery giant separates its freight business, Jim Cramer said Tuesday.

title: York truck driver charged in 2024 fatal crash in East Hanover Twp.
description: A 71-year-old York man faces homicide by vehicle and other charges in a fatal 2024 crash that killed a FedEx driver on a Lebanon County highway.

title: York truck driver charged in 2024 fatal crash in East Hanover Twp.
description: A 71-year-old York man faces homicide by vehicle and other charges in a fatal 2024 crash that killed a FedEx driver on a Lebanon County highway.

title: FedEx InPost Bid Tests Growth Ambitions Valuation Gap And Debt Concerns
description: FedEx, trading as NYSE:FDX, is leading a consortium that has launched a multibillion dollar takeover offer for InPost, Poland's largest parcel delivery network operator. The proposed deal targets InPost's parcel locker and last mile delivery network across Poland and other European markets. The offer signals a push by FedEx to expand its European e commerce logistics reach through a major international acquisition. FedEx enters this potential transaction with the stock at $394.2 and recent...

title: FedEx sum-of-the-parts valuation points to upside as freight spin-off approaches, UBS says
description: UBS is sticking with a Buy rating on FedEx Corp (NYSE:FDX, XETRA:FDX) and a price target of $445, as the company gets ready to spin off its freight business into a standalone stock next week. title: Top Trade Ideas for the Week of May 26, 2026: The Rest Premium
Tariff refunds are showing up — in a big way — on the government's bottom line
description: The US Customs and Border Protection has already withdrawn about $14 billion more in May, in a clear indication that the quantity of tariff refund checks going out to importers is heating up rapidly.
